hero.badge: Idatha ibonisiwe • Ubulungisa bokubikezela • Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-Registry
hero.subtitle: Registry-verified supplier discovery and structured RFQ workflows. Operator-reviewed sourcing — not marketplace volume.
home.supplierNetwork.subtitleSuffix: amazwe—avunywa yi-registry, ahlangabezana nezindinganiso, alungele ukuhlaziywa okujulile.
home.supplierRegions.title: Abaphakeli Ngamazwe
home.industries.title: Imikhakha Engaphezu Kwamashumi Amabili. Ikhishwe Yezomnotho Eziyiqiniso.
home.industries.subtitle: Kusukela emadodeni nasekuphakeleni kuya ezempilo nakwimikhiqizo ye-elektroniki—abaphakeli abavunywa yi-registry abahlelwe ukuze bahlangabezane nezidingo zezimboni nezokuthengwa kwe-B2B.
home.features.title: Yakhelwe ngezikhathi ezibalulekile zokuthenga
home.features.subtitle: Not a generic contact database. Registry-verified supplier records, landed costs, and structured RFQ workflows — built for industrial procurement teams.
home.showcase.title: Iziqinisekiso Eziholela Emiphumeleni
home.showcase.subtitle: Ukubona okuphelele kwabaphakeli, izindleko, nezingozi. {{suppliers}} amarekhodi—ahlaziywa njalo, anokukhanya okukhulu, hhayi amandla kuphela.
home.howItWorks.title: Kusukela Ekusesheni Kuya Ekwenzeni Eminithini
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Izinyathelo ezintathu ezilula zokuthenga okuhlakaniphile. Akukho ubunzima. Imiphumela kuphela.
home.step1.title: Sitshele Okudingayo
home.step1.desc: Enter commodity, specification, quantity, destination, and lead time. Structured intake — not a keyword marketplace search.
home.step2.title: SmartSeek sourcing operator review
home.step2.desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your request, validates registry provenance, and routes RFQs to verified suppliers only.
home.step3.title: Yenza Izinqumo Ngokuzethemba
home.step3.desc: Receive structured quotes with MOQ, lead time, Incoterms, and supplier provenance. You decide who to engage.
home.cta.title: Izinyathelo Ezihlakaniphile Ziqala Lapha
home.cta.subtitle: Structured RFQ workflows for industrial procurement teams. No fabricated scale claims during beta.
home.cta.footer: Akukho khadi lesikweletu · Uhlelo mahhala · Khansela nganoma yisiphi isikhathi
footer.tagline: Ukuhweba okukhiqizwa nge-AI kanye nolwazi lomsebenzi lwezithengisi ezikhethekile.
footer.designedFor: Abahlinzeki kuqala. Uhlanga lwezohwebo kuqala. Bakhiwe amaqembu okuthengwa.
home.feature1.title: Ubulunga Bobungozi
home.feature1.desc: Registry-verified supplier records with procurement-oriented metadata. Risk signals from published registry and trade data — not fabricated scores.
home.feature2.title: Umshini Wokubala Izindleko
home.feature2.desc: Thola izindleko eziyinqaba kuhlanganise nezindleko, ukuthunyelwa, umshwalense, nezinguquko zezimali. Ubuchwepheshe bokuhweba, hhayi ukucabanga. Akukho zindleko ezimangazayo.
home.feature3.title: Thola Abathengi & Iziqondiso Zokuhweba
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} abathengi & iziqondiso zokuhweba—zihlelwe nge-AI ngokuhlosiwe, ifomu, kanye nezimpawu zokuhweba. Akukho ukuchitha. Idatha yekhwalithi, engahlaziywa yizigaba zokuthenga.
home.feature4.title: Ukuhambisana Kulula
home.feature4.desc: Ukuqinisekiswa okusekelwe kumarejista, ukuhlolwa kweziqinisekiso, kanye nezinqubo zokufaneleka. Idatha ehambisana nezinga ukuze ugxile kulokho okubalulekile.
home.feature5.title: Idatha Yabathengisi Bomhlaba
home.feature5.desc: Finyelela kubathengisi abaqinisekisiwe nabathembekile {{suppliers}} ezweni {{countries}}. Hlunga ngezimboni, izindawo, iziqinisekiso. Thola umphakathi wakho ngemizuzwana.
home.feature6.title: Sourcing reports
home.feature6.desc: Structured supplier comparisons and RFQ-ready specification summaries for procurement teams.
home.industry1.title: Ukumba & Imayini
home.industry1.desc: I-Antimony, ithini, i-lithium, i-cobalt, i-copper, kanye nezinto ezitholakala kuphela. Abahlinzeki bemayini abaqinisekisiwe bezokuhlinzeka ngezinsiza ezibalulekile.
home.industry2.title: Ukukhiqiza & Imboni
home.industry2.desc: Thola izinto zokwakha, izingxenye, kanye nezinsiza ezivela kubakhiqizi abaqinisekisiwe emhlabeni jikelele.
home.industry3.title: Izingxenye Zobuchwepheshe & Ubumba
home.industry3.desc: Thola abahlinzeki bezinsiza ze-semiconductor, abakhiqizi be-PCB, kanye nabasabalalisi bezingxenye zobuchwepheshe.
home.industry4.title: Izimpahla Zokuthenga & Ukuthengisa
home.industry4.desc: Xhuma nabahlinzeki bezokupakisha, izimpahla eziphelile, kanye nemikhiqizo ye-private label.
home.industry5.title: Imoto & Ukuthutha
home.industry5.desc: Thola izingxenye zemoto, izingxenye ze-OEM, kanye nezinsiza zokuthutha emhlabeni jikelele.
home.industry6.title: Ezempilo & Imishini Yokwelapha
home.industry6.desc: Thola abahlinzeki abahambisana ne-FDA bezemishini yokwelapha nemikhiqizo yezempilo.
home.industry7.title: Ukwakha & Izinto
home.industry7.desc: Thola izinto zokwakha, imishini emikhulu, kanye nezinsiza zokwakha.
persona.procurers.headline: Nciphisa ubungozi. Thuthukisa imikhawulo. Gcina uhambisana.
persona.procurers.subline: Registry-verified supplier discovery, landed cost tools, and operator-routed RFQs for procurement teams.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Thola ngokushesha. Khulisa ngokuqonda. Qala masinyane.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Thola abahlinzeki abagunyaziwe emizuzwini, hhayi ezinyangeni. Amanani akhululekile kumabhizinisi amasha nemishini yokusebenza efanelekile.
persona.suppliers.headline: Tholwa. Win more RFQs.
persona.suppliers.subline: Joyina {{suppliers}} abahlinzeki abagunyaziwe. Thola ukucela kwabathengi okuhloniphekile futhi ukhule ibhizinisi lakho lokuthekelisa.
persona.producers.headline: Lawula izindleko. Qinisekisa ikhwalithi. Phumelela ezindaweni ezahlukeneyo.
persona.producers.subline: Ukuhlinzekwa kwezinto ezisemqoka, ukuhlolwa kwezindleko, kanye nokuhluka kwabahlinzeki kubaholi bokukhiqiza.
methodology.title: Indlela esiqinisekisa ngayo abahlinzeki
methodology.subtitle: Ukuhlonishwa kwendlela yethu kukhuthaza ukwethenjwa. Nansi indlela esiqinisekisa ngayo ubuqiniso bedatha.
methodology.step1.title: Ukuqoqa idatha
methodology.step1.desc: Siqoqe idatha yabahlinzeki emabhukwini ezohwebo, izitifiketi, kanye nemithombo yebhizinisi egunyaziwe. I-graph yomhlaba wonke ye-abahlinzeki ivuselelwa njalo.
methodology.step2.title: Ukuqinisekiswa
methodology.step2.desc: Kulowo nalowo abahlinzeki, kuhlolwa ama-akhawunti, ukujoliswa komlando wezohwebo, kanye nokuhlolwa kokuhambisana. I-Registry-eshayelwa, ikhwalithi yokuhambisana.
methodology.step3.title: Ukwahlula ikhwalithi
methodology.step3.desc: Ama-algorithms ethu anikela izilinganiso ezxhumene nezikhathi zokuphendula, izinga lesitifiketi, kanye nempendulo yabathengi. I-AI-ibalwe, impendulo ephakeme.
methodology.step4.title: Ukuhlolwa okuqhubekayo
methodology.step4.desc: Siqapha njalo izimpawu zobungozi futhi sishintsha isimo sabahlinzeki ngokuya ngedatha yansuku zonke. Ukuqinisekiswa, ubuchwepheshe obusekelwe ku-Registry.
integrationsPage.title: Xhuma i-SmartSeek ne-Stack Yakho
integrationsPage.subtitle: Hlukanisa abahlinzeki, i-RFQs, nezindleko eziphumayo nezinhlelo zakho zokuthengwa kanye ne-ERP. Ukuxhumana okukhululekile, i-API ephephile, kanye nezixhumi ezakhayo.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Xhuma amathuluzi akho okuthengwa. Idatha ihlale ihlukaniswe ngokuzenzakalelayo.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Khetha i-SAP Ariba, i-Oracle, i-Salesforce, noma abanye ohlwini.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Imigudu ye-OAuth 2.0—awunakufihla amaphasiwedi. Ukuxhumeka kwe-SSO kwezinkampani kuyasekelwa.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Abahlinzeki, i-RFQs, nezindleko zedatha ziqhube phakathi kwezinhlelo ngasikhathi sinye.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: Buyer and supplier data is handled confidentially. TLS in transit, encryption at rest. SOC 2 attestation is in progress — we do not claim certifications we have not completed.
home.trial.title: Qala Uhlolo Lwakho Lwamahhala
home.trial.footer: Ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu • Imibiko emibili yamahhala • Ukufinyelela okuphelele kwenkundla
home.benefits.saveTitle: Gcina Isikhathi Nezimali Kuzo Zonke Izinqumo
home.benefits.saveDesc: SmartSeek focuses on registry-verified discovery and operator-routed RFQs — not inflated outcome metrics.
home.benefits.securityDesc: Confidential RFQ handling, encrypted transport, and role-based access. Compliance attestation status is published when available.
home.benefits.encryption: Ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusuka ekuqaleni kuze kube sekupheleni
home.ready.title: Usezingeni Lokuthenga Ngokuhlakaniphile?
home.ready.subtitle: Qala ukwenza izinqumo ezingcono zokuthenga namuhla. Akukho khadi lesikweletu elidingekayo.
dashboard.subtitle: Operator-routed sourcing for procurement teams.
dashboard.tryRefreshing: Ngiyacela ukuthi uzame ukuvuselela le ipheji.
auth.signupDesc: Create your beta account for registry-verified supplier discovery and structured RFQ workflows.
auth.forgotDesc: Faka i-imeyili yakho bese sithumela isixhumanisi sokubuyisela
auth.tryAgainOrEmail: Sicela zama futhi noma sebenzisa imeyili/iphasiwedi.
auth.resetLinkSent: Uma i-akhawunti ikhona, sithumele i-link yokubuyisela.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Wamukela ku-SmartSeek. Uthole amakhredithi ama-2 mahala.
auth.checkCredentials: Sicela qinisekisa iziqu zakho futhi zama futhi.
auth.validation.passwordLength: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe okungenani nezincwadi eziyi-6
home.hero.title1: Yazi inani lakho langempela ngaphambi kokuthi uthathe isinqumo
home.hero.subtitleBase: Thola abahlinzeki, bala izindleko zangempela zokungenisa (ukuthutha, imikhawulo, intela, ezweni), futhi wenze izinqumo ngokuqinisekile.
home.hero.painLine: Stop ukuthumela ama-imeyili abandayo. Stop ukuhamba phambili ngezindleko. Stop ukuphazamiseka emikhawulweni.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Sesha abahlinzeki ngempahla, inqubo, indawo, noma isitifiketi
home.integrations.label: Ihlanganisa nezinsiza ozisebenzisayo eqenjini lakho lokuthenga
home.feat1.quote: "Sichitha amasonto amathathu sithumela ama-imeyili ab冷 ku-suppliers abangaphenduli — futhi siphetha sinesiphakamiso esingalungile."
home.feat1.title: Thola abahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe ngemizuzwana
home.feat1.desc: Izixhumanisi eziqinisekisiwe ezivela kumasuppliers {{suppliers}}. Ukuqhathaniswa okuvela kumarejista ezinkampani, amadathasethi ezohwebo, nezinsiza zangaphandle.
home.feat2.quote: "Sihlele u-$42k. I-invoyisi ibikade $61k. Ukwehluka bekungamakhokhiso esingazange sazi ukuthi exist."
home.feat2.title: Yazi intengo yakho yangempela ngaphambi kokuthi uqinisekise
home.feat2.desc: Amakhokhiso, ukuthunyelwa, ukuqinisekisa, izimali zephothi, i-VAT — kubalwa kusenesikhathi. Akukho zinkinga lapho ithoni ifika.
home.feat2.b1: Ukubheka ikhodi ye-HS & amanani amakhokhiso aphilayo
home.feat3.quote: "Umphakeli wethu ophakeme wayesendaweni eyashintsha. Asinayo isu lokubuyisela emuva futhi sahluleka ukukhiqiza izinsuku eziyi-6."
home.feat3.title: Bona ubungozi bomphakeli ngaphambi kokuthi kukubize
home.feat3.desc: Landela izimpawu zobungozi bokuthola phakathi kwabaphakeli nasezindaweni ngaphambi kokuba zibe izimanga ezibizayo.
home.feat3.b1: Izinkomba zobungozi bomphakeli nezwe kuboniswa endaweni eyodwa
home.pain.stat1desc: Isikhathi esijwayelekile amaqembu okuthenga asisebenzisayo ocwaningweni lwabaphakeli
home.pain.stat2desc: Ukulahleka okulinganiselwa ngonyaka ngakunye kwenkampani ngenxa yezindleko zokungenisa ezifihlekile nokukhetha abaphakeli ababi
home.pain.stat3desc: Ukuncishiswa kwezindleko okujwayelekile okukhuluma ngabasebenzisi be-SmartSeek ezinsukwini zabo zokuqala eziyi-90
home.pain.footnote: Abasebenzisi be-SmartSeek baphuma ezinsukwini ezingu-14 zokucwaninga naphansi kwe-2. Lokho kusho amahora angama-12 abuyisiwe — ngeviki ngalinye.
home.hiw.title: Kusuka ekusesheni kuya kwenkontileka ezinsukwini — hhayi ezinyangeni
home.hiw.step1.title: Thola
home.hiw.step1.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers by commodity, region, and specification. Matches include registry provenance — not scraped contact lists.
home.hiw.step2.title: Bala
home.hiw.step2.desc: Bona izindleko zangempela zokufika ngemizuzwana. Qhathanisa abahlinzeki ngokuhlanganiswa kwezindleko, hhayi kuphela ngentengo yodwa.
home.hiw.step3.title: Thatha Isinqumo
home.hiw.step3.desc: Submit structured RFQs reviewed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator. Quotes return with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms.

home.pain.card3desc: isikhathi esijwayelekile sokuhlonza umphakeli omusha ngaphandle kwethu

home.pricing.subtitle: Isivivinyo samahhala se-14 izinsuku · Akukho khadi lesikweletu elidingekayo · Ukubuyiselwa okuphelele uma unganelisekile
home.pricing.tierProDesc: Ukusesha okungapheli, ibhuku lezindleko ezifika, ukuthekelisa — isivivinyo samahhala se-14 izinsuku
home.pricing.tierEnterpriseDesc: Ukuhlanganiswa okwenziwe ngokwezifiso, ukwesekwa okukhululekile, ukufinyelela kwedatha enkulu
home.integrations.title: Ihlanganisa nezinsiza zakho ezikhona
home.integrations.sectionDesc: Xhumanisa abahlinzeki, izikhumbuzo, nedatha yokuthenga ngqo kwi-ERP, CRM, nezinhlelo zokuthenga ezikhona. Akukho ukudluliswa okwenziwa ngesandla.
home.demo.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers across industrial categories. Preview results are curated; full directory access is available to founding users during beta.
home.demo.placeholder: Zama: "umkhiqizi wezindwangu zekhothoni eTurkey" noma "amaphaneli elanga eChina"
home.demo.suppliersFound: abakhiqizi batholakele — kuboniswa imiphumela emithathu yamahhala
home.demo.enterProduct: Faka noma yisiphi umkhiqizo, impahla, noma umkhakha ngenhla
home.demo.clickQuick: Noma chofoza ukuze uthole imiphumela ngokushesha
home.demo.freeUnlocks: Beta accounts unlock the full supplier directory and verified contact details where available.
home.capabilities.title: Izinsiza ezintathu zokuhlakanipha. Ipulatifomu eyodwa.
home.capabilities.subtitle: From verified supplier discovery to structured RFQ workflows — built for procurement teams.
home.capabilities.findSuppliersDesc: Sesha abahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe emhlabeni jikelele ngokwemikhiqizo, izwe, isitifiketi, nosayizi. Bahleliwe ukuze baxhumane futhi banamaphuzu okwakhiwa kwekhwalithi.
home.capabilities.findLeadsDesc: Amathuba abathengi ahloliwe. Hluza ngokwezinhloso, imboni, indawo, nosayizi wenkampani. Yakhelwe ukuthintana kwe-B2B.
home.capabilities.aiIntelDesc: Registry provenance, landed cost estimates, and structured quote comparison for procurement decisions.
home.trust.structuredQuotes: Izinkambu zokuqashwa ezihlelwe kahle (MOQ, isikhathi sokuhola, Incoterms)
home.trustBlock.heading: Idatha yangempela. Izindleko zangempela. Izinqumo zangempela.
home.trustBlock.body: SmartSeek connects you to registry-backed supplier records and the full landed cost picture — not just unit prices. Built by cross-border sourcing operators, not a marketplace listing team.
home.trustBlock.bullet1: Iziqinisekiso zabahlinzeki ezisekelwe kwi-registry, akukho okungeniswe ngokungafanele
home.trustBlock.bullet2: Izindleko eziphelele zangempela: impahla, imikhawulo, intela, ngaphakathi — konke kufakiwe
home.trustBlock.cta: Request beta access — founding member pricing when paid plans launch
home.hero.banner: Mahhala ngesikhathi se-beta · Iphothifoliyo yokuthenga ivulekile
home.hero.subtitle: Thola abahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe bezinsimbi ezibalulekile nezinto zokusebenza zemboni. Thumela i-RFQ futhi uthole izicaphuno ezihlelwe kahle ezine-MOQ, isikhathi sokuhola, kanye ne-Incoterms ezivela kubahlinzeki abaqinisekisiwe.
home.hero.builtFor: Yakhelwe amaqembu okuthenga kwezomnotho aphatha izinqubo zokuthenga ezihambisana nezincazelo.
home.how.title: Inqubo yokuthenga ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka kwemakethe
home.how.step1Desc: Chaza okudingayo: impahla, incazelo, inani, indawo, isikhathi sokuhola. Kuthatha imizuzu emibili.
home.how.step2Desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your RFQ and routes it only to suppliers verified against public company registries.
home.how.step3Desc: Izicaphuno ziza nezincoterms, isikhathi sokuhola, MOQ, kanye nomthombo wabahlinzeki. Uthatha isinqumo sokuthi ubani okufanele uxhumane naye.
home.why.title: Ayikho imiphumela ethathwe. Ayikho imiyalezo eminingi. Ayikho umdlalo wemakethe.
home.why.body: Every supplier we publish is checked against a company registry — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — and confirmed via direct contact. RFQs are routed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator, not by an algorithm.
home.founding.body: Siyawamukela amaqembu athile okuthenga ngesikhathi sokuhlola ukuze wonke ama-akhawunti athole ukwesekwa okuqondile kokuthenga kanye nokuhanjiswa kwezinsiza okusheshayo.
home.preview.lockBody: Mahhala ngesikhathi sokuhlola. Sihlanganisa abathengi ngesandla ukuze wonke ama-akhawunti athole ukwesekwa kokuthenga.
home.sections.previewBody: A sample of registry-verified suppliers across metals, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Full directory unlocked for founding users during beta.
home.founding.noPayment: Ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu. Akukho uhlelo lokukhokha ngesikhathi se-beta.
home.seo.description: Operator-led industrial sourcing platform with registry-verified suppliers, structured RFQs, and strong metals expertise.
